name: Belvo
description: Open finance API platform for Latin America enabling financial data access and payment initiation in Brazil, Mexico, Colombia.

seo.title: Belvo — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Belvo: Open finance API platform for Latin America enabling financial data access and payment initiation in Brazil, Mexico, Colombia.

when_to_use: Open banking data aggregation for LATAM fintech applications
Bank account verification for payment apps in Mexico and Brazil
Income and transaction history for credit scoring in LATAM
PSD2-style account data access for Colombian and Chilean banks
Connecting users' bank accounts to personal finance apps in LatAm

pros: Deepest LatAm open finance coverage available
PIX and payment initiation in Brazil supported
Handles Brazil, Mexico, Colombia in one API
Category-enriched transactions ready for credit models
cons: Regional scope excludes US and EU markets
Bank connector stability varies by country
Regulatory landscape in region still shifting
review.verdict: Go-to open finance API for LatAm fintechs; outside that region there are better choices.
review.best_for: Fintechs and lenders operating in Brazil, Mexico, or Colombia
review.not_for: Teams outside LatAm or needing global bank coverage
